title: schizachyrium striatum
intro: Schizachyrium striatum, also known as Little Bluestem, is a perennial grass native to North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and ease respiratory issues due to its high concentration of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Schizachyrium striatum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make salves and ointments.
